data.title: LeBron James Says He Is Joining the Philadelphia 76ers
data.description:
LeBron James said he is signing with the Philadelphia 76ers for his 24th NBA season, ending his run with the Los Angeles Lakers, according to Bloomberg.

James is the NBA’s all-time leading scorer.

data.title: Nigeria’s Four Major Crude Grades Exports Seen Averaging 952,000 Barrels a Day in September
data.description: According to Jin10, exports of four major Nigerian crude grades are expected to average 952,000 barrels a day in September, up from 763,000 barrels a day in August.

data.title: Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Qaribabadi: Countries Providing Bases or Territory to Aggressors Will Be Classified as Aggressors
data.description: According to Jin10, Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Gharibabadi said European countries must understand that providing bases or territory to aggressors will also classify them as aggressors.

data.title: Euro Zone Data Seen Showing Resilient Growth, Faster Inflation
data.description:
The euro zone’s first data batch for policymakers weighing another interest-rate hike is expected to show resilient expansion and faster inflation, according to Bloomberg.

The readings would add to the case for the European Central Bank to keep pressure on inflation as officials assess whether more tightening is needed.

data.title: AI TRENDS | AWS Says OpenAI GPT-5.6 SOL, TERRA, and LUNA Are Now Live on Amazon Bedrock
data.description: According to Jin10, Amazon Web Services (AWS) said OpenAI GPT-5.6 SOL, TERRA, and LUNA are now officially available on Amazon Bedrock.

data.title: Walmart, Taco Bell Hit by Taylor Farms Produce
data.description:
Taylor Farms produce has been implicated in a wave of hits to major food retailers and restaurant chains, including Walmart and Taco Bell, according to Bloomberg.

The source did not provide additional details on the specific products or incidents.

data.title: STOCKS | European Major Stock Indexes Rise on July 24 Close
data.description: Major European stock indexes closed higher on July 24. According to Jin10, Germany's DAX 30 rose 396.05 points, or 1.60%, to 25,105.38; the U.K.'s FTSE 100 gained 100.23 points, or 0.94%, to 10,739.40; France's CAC 40 added 73.19 points, or 0.88%, to 8,372.28; the Euro Stoxx 50 climbed 71.98 points, or 1.16%, to 6,282.15; Spain's IBEX 35 advanced 322.83 points, or 1.68%, to 19,589.83; and Italy's FTSE MIB rose 495.16 points, or 0.96%, to 51,811.00.

data.title: CLARITY Act Draft Splits Wall Street and Crypto as Senate Faces 60-Vote Test
data.description: The revised CLARITY Act draft has divided Wall Street and crypto figures as the Senate bill needs 60 votes to advance. According to NS3.AI, David Solomon reportedly urged Congress to move the bill forward, while major banking groups warned that stablecoin rewards could pull deposits away from banks. Seven Democratic senators said the draft still needs stronger protections.

data.title: ECB Chief Economist Lane Says Inflation Will Return to Target Within About a Year
data.description: ECB Chief Economist Philip R. Lane said inflation will be guided back to target levels within about a year. According to Jin10, Lane made the comment.

data.title: Pakistan Official: Houthi Attacks on Saudi Arabia Must Stop Before U.S.-Iran Truce
data.description: According to Jin10, a Pakistani official said the Houthis stopping attacks on Saudi Arabia and other Gulf states would be a prerequisite for resuming U.S.-Iran talks, and Pakistan has conveyed that message to Iran. Yemen's Houthi movement said on Thursday that it hit two Saudi oil tankers.

data.title: World Network Secures $52.5 Million In Fresh Funding To Fight Deepfakes
data.description: Sam Altman-backed World Network has secured $52.5 million in fresh funding as it shifts from basic network expansion to integrating its biometric screening devices across enterprise software suites. The project is now focusing entirely on that enterprise rollout, according to CoinDesk, as it aims to help combat online AI deepfakes.

data.title: Galaxy Research Cuts Clarity Act Passage Odds in 2026 to 30%
data.description: Galaxy Research has lowered its estimate that the Clarity Act becomes law in 2026 to 30%, down from 50% less than a month ago. According to NS3.AI, Alex Thorn said the bill needs a last-ditch effort as the Senate faces its August recess. Seven Democratic senators said the latest version still falls short.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Vladimir Putin Says He Will Not Sell Weapons to Iran
data.description: According to Jin10, U.S. President Donald Trump said Russian President Vladimir Putin stated that he would not sell weapons to Iran.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Trump’s Saudi Nuclear Deal Draws Watchdog Interest
data.description:
Donald Trump’s plans for a nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia are putting tensions between U.S. and South Korean reactor developers in the spotlight, according to Bloomberg.

The dispute has surfaced details of a clash over market access and drawn interest from regulators.

data.title: Pakistan Explores Ways to Restart U.S.-Iran Talks
data.description: According to three Pakistani sources, Pakistan is exploring ways to restart U.S.-Iran talks in an effort to end nearly five months of war. According to Jin10, exploratory talks were held during Iranian Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni's visit to Islamabad this week, his second trip in the past 10 days, and he met with Pakistani government leaders and army chief Asim Munir. According to the Pakistani government statement, Momeni is seen as having close ties to Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps. The three sources also warned that obstacles to talks with the United States remain high.

data.title: Brazil's Central Bank Governor Says Many Studies Will Explore El Nino's Impact on CPI
data.description: Brazil's Central Bank Governor said many studies will explore El Nino's impact on CPI. According to Jin10, the governor made the remark without providing further details.

data.title: US Measles Cases Hit 35-Year High
data.description: US measles cases in 2026 have already topped last year’s total and reached a level not seen in more than three decades, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: Brazil's Central Bank Governor: We Monitor Brent Crude Performance Daily
data.description: According to Jin10, Brazil's central bank governor said they monitor Brent crude oil performance every day.

data.title: Trump To Meet Netanyahu At White House On Tuesday
data.description: According to Axios, President Donald Trump will meet Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu at the White House on Tuesday, according to a statement from Netanyahu's office. The statement said Netanyahu will depart for Washington on Monday for an official visit, meet Trump at the White House on Tuesday and attend the funeral service for Senator Lindsey Graham. Axios reported that Netanyahu has met with Trump six times in the Oval Office since Trump returned to office about a year and a half ago, and that Trump is considering resuming major combat operations in Iran that could include a joint military campaign with Israel. Axios also reported that some White House officials said last week Netanyahu tried to "will the meeting into existence," and Trump told Axios on Thursday that he would meet Netanyahu if he was in town for Graham's funeral ceremony.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Cyclospora Outbreak Linked to Mexican Lettuce Spreads to Four More US States
data.description:
Federal health officials linked four additional states to a cyclosporiasis outbreak tied to tainted iceberg lettuce imported from Mexico, as the illness continues to spread across the US, according to Bloomberg.

The outbreak has sickened thousands of people and now includes Illinois, Kansas, Oklahoma and Pennsylvania.
